---
title: tidyverse
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{css css_custom, code=readLines("_css_custom.css"), echo=FALSE}
```
```{r knitr_config, code=readLines("_knitr_config.R"), echo=FALSE}
```
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

*********************************************************************

## dplyr

### filter_*

#### filter_all

```r
# remove rows that have any NA
df %>% filter_all(any_vars(!is.na(.)))

# remove rows that are all NA
df %>% filter_all(all_vars(!is.na(.)))
```

#### filter_at

```r
mtcars %>% filter_at(any_vars())
mtcars %>% filter_at(any_vars())
```

#### filter_if

```r
mtcars %>% filter_if(any_vars())
mtcars %>% filter_if(any_vars())
```

*********************************************************************

## ggplot2

* 45 degree axis labels  

* rbind/cbind plots to make the axes line up

* position dodge same width

*********************************************************************

## tidyr

### complete
